reason: Switching SELinux to enforcing can cause service disruptions or loss of SSH/console access if policies or file labels are not correctly configured. The remediation requires a system reboot and runs fixfiles onboot, which may affect many files. Human verification is needed to ensure SELinux policies are in place and that console access is available before applying the change.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; Potential service disruption; Possible SSH lockout; Requires system reboot; SELinux policy compliance
